tasks.label: run-otel-collector-detached
tasks.command: docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' camus-otel-collector >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'camus-otel-collector is running' || ( docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -qx 'camus-otel-collector' && docker start camus-otel-collector || docker run -d --name camus-otel-collector --network camus-observability -p 4317:4317 -p 4318:4318 -p 8889:8889 -v "${workspaceFolder}/src/Adapters/emc.observability.components/otel-collector.yaml:/etc/otelcol/config.yaml" otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:latest --config /etc/otelcol/config.yaml )

tasks.label: run-prometheus-detached
tasks.command: docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' camus-prometheus >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'camus-prometheus is running' || ( docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -qx 'camus-prometheus' && docker start camus-prometheus || docker run -d --name camus-prometheus --network camus-observability -p 9090:9090 -v "${workspaceFolder}/src/Adapters/emc.observability.components/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml:ro" prom/prometheus:latest --config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml --storage.tsdb.retention.time=1d --storage.tsdb.retention.size=1GB )

tasks.label: run-jaeger-detached
tasks.command: docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' camus-jaeger >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'camus-jaeger is running' || ( docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -qx 'camus-jaeger' && docker start camus-jaeger || docker run -d --name camus-jaeger --network camus-observability -p 16686:16686 -p 14250:14250 -e SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=memory -e MEMORY_MAX_TRACES=500000 --memory=1g --memory-swap=1g jaegertracing/all-in-one:latest )

tasks.label: run-grafana-detached
tasks.command: docker inspect -f '{{.State.Running}}' camus-grafana >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'camus-grafana is running' || ( docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -qx 'camus-grafana' && docker start camus-grafana || docker run -d --name camus-grafana --network camus-observability -p 3000:3000 -e GF_USERS_DEFAULT_THEME=dark -e GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ENABLED=true -e GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ORG_ROLE=Viewer -v "${workspaceFolder}/src/Adapters/emc.observability.components/grafana-datasources.yaml:/etc/grafana/provisioning/datasources/grafana-datasources.yaml:ro" grafana/grafana:latest )
